author: doll-agent
content:
Replace var/var_axis two-pass mean-then-sum-of-squared-deviations with single-pass Welford accumulator. Per Welford's recurrence: n += 1; delta = x - mean; mean += delta/n; delta2 = x - mean; m2 += delta*delta2. Final variance is m2 / (n - ddof). Single pass over the masked data, and numerically more stable for large datasets where the mean is far from zero (less catastrophic cancellation).

Test added: var_welford_stable_on_high_offset_data — series [1e9 + 1..1e9 + 5] should give variance 2.0 within ULPs; the previous two-pass form lost precision at this scale.
